prompt: Does current MoonBit have a defer statement? Reply with a first line that is exactly YES or NO, then at most three lines of justification (mention scoping behavior if YES).
grader_note: 2026-07-18: first_line_is checks equality, so answers such as YESBUT do not pass; the required justification must identify block-based or block-scoped lifetime and must not negate that property.
truth: defer exists since the 2025-08 update; it is block-scoped, LIFO per block (verified by fixture lang-trap-go-defer-block-scoped).
